name: rent_roll_date_present
expression: rent_roll_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(rent_roll_date)) > 0
description: rent_roll_date is required for Rent Roll extraction.

name: property_address_present
expression: property_address IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(property_address)) > 0
description: property_address is required for Rent Roll extraction.

name: tenant_entries_present
expression: tenant_entries IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(tenant_entries) > 0
description: tenant_entries is required for Rent Roll extraction.

name: monthly_scheduled_rent_present
expression: monthly_scheduled_rent IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(monthly_scheduled_rent)) > 0
description: monthly_scheduled_rent is required for Rent Roll extraction.

name: total_units_or_suites_non_negative
description: total_units_or_suites should be non-negative when present.

name: occupied_units_or_suites_non_negative
description: occupied_units_or_suites should be non-negative when present.

name: occupancy_rate_non_negative
description: occupancy_rate should be non-negative when present.

name: monthly_scheduled_rent_non_negative
description: monthly_scheduled_rent should be non-negative when present.

name: delinquent_amount_non_negative
description: delinquent_amount should be non-negative when present.
